outcomes: Execute complex landscape or figurative expressions implementing advanced paint applications such as impasto and transparent glazing layers
Produce fine art prints using traditional intaglio etching or multi-block color woodcut techniques safely

sub_strands.sub_strand: Keyframe Animation, Storyboarding, and Vector Assets
outcomes: Construct fluid vector-based 2D animations using keyframe manipulation, ease-in/ease-out curves, and onion-skinning mechanics
Compile professional animatics matching clear timing audio tracks to establish proper kinematic storytelling parameters
